requirement_topic.en: Authorized Dominican Importer — RNC / DGII Registration and Local Representative Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 授权多米尼加进口商——RNC / DGII注册与当地代表要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權多明尼加進口商——RNC / DGII註冊與當地代表要求

summary.en: Chinese exporters of wireless and IoT devices to the Dominican Republic must engage an authorized Dominican importer or local representative registered with the DGII (Dirección General de Impuestos Internos — Dominican Internal Revenue Directorate) through the RNC (Registro Nacional de Contribuyentes — National Taxpayer Registry). The authorized importer is a named party in the INDOTEL homologación application and bears legal responsibility for ensuring imported products comply with INDOTEL type approval, NORDOM standards, and Dominican customs requirements. Dominican customs (DGA — Dirección General de Aduanas) requires commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, and — for radio and telecom terminal equipment — the INDOTEL homologación certificate as a condition of clearance. The Dominican Republic is a member of CAFTA-DR (Central America–Dominican Republic–United States Free Trade Agreement), which provides preferential tariff treatment for qualifying goods from the US but does not eliminate regulatory compliance obligations for Chinese exporters. Spanish-language product labelling referencing the authorized Dominican importer's name and address, the INDOTEL homologación number, applicable voltage and frequency, and safety certifications is required.
summary.zh: 向多米尼加共和国出口无线和物联网设备的中国出口商须委托通过DGII（多米尼加国内税务总局）以RNC（国家纳税人登记号）注册的授权多米尼加进口商或当地代表。授权进口商作为INDOTEL型式认可申请中的具名方，对确保进口产品符合INDOTEL型式认可、NORDOM标准和多米尼加海关要求承担法律责任。多米尼加海关（DGA——海关总局）要求提交商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书，以及——对于无线电及电信终端设备——作为清关条件的INDOTEL型式认可证书。多米尼加共和国是CAFTA-DR（中美洲—多米尼加共和国—美国自由贸易协定）成员，该协定为来自美国的符合条件的商品提供优惠关税待遇，但不免除中国出口商的监管合规义务。须使用注明授权多米尼加进口商姓名地址、INDOTEL型式认可编号、适用电压和频率及安全认证的西班牙语产品标签。
summary.zht: 向多明尼加共和國出口無線和物聯網裝置的中國出口商須委託通過DGII（多明尼加國內稅務總局）以RNC（國家納稅人登記號）註冊的授權多明尼加進口商或當地代表。授權進口商作為INDOTEL型式認可申請中的具名方，對確保進口產品符合INDOTEL型式認可、NORDOM標準和多明尼加海關要求承擔法律責任。多明尼加海關（DGA——海關總局）要求提交商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書，以及——對於無線電及電信終端裝置——作為清關條件的INDOTEL型式認可證書。多明尼加共和國是CAFTA-DR（中美洲—多明尼加共和國—美國自由貿易協定）成員，該協定為來自美國的符合條件的商品提供優惠關稅待遇，但不免除中國出口商的監管合規義務。須使用注明授權多明尼加進口商姓名地址、INDOTEL型式認可編號、適用電壓和頻率及安全認證的西班牙語產品標籤。

standards_or_laws: DGII (Dirección General de Impuestos Internos) — Dominican Internal Revenue Directorate; administers RNC (National Taxpayer Registry) for all Dominican business entities including importers
RNC (Registro Nacional de Contribuyentes) — Dominican national taxpayer identification number required for all businesses operating as importers in the Dominican Republic
DGA (Dirección General de Aduanas) — Dominican customs authority; requires INDOTEL homologación certificate for clearance of radio and telecom terminal equipment
CAFTA-DR (Dominican Republic–Central America–United States Free Trade Agreement) — trade framework affecting tariff rates and customs procedures for goods from CAFTA-DR member states
Ley General de Telecomunicaciones 153-98 — establishes requirement for authorized Dominican representative in INDOTEL homologación applications

summary.en: In China, foreign exporters of electronic goods do not require a local Chinese importer in the same regulatory sense — Chinese domestic distributors and importers operate under standard commercial arrangements. The MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) for telecom terminal equipment requires a Chinese licence holder but does not impose the same authorized representative model as the Dominican Republic's INDOTEL homologación system. Chinese customs (GACC — General Administration of Customs of China) administers export clearance with standard commercial documentation. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to the Dominican RNC/DGII authorized importer registration requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国，外国电子产品出口商无需以同等监管意义设置当地中国进口商——中国国内经销商和进口商通过标准商业安排运营。电信终端设备的MIIT进网许可证（NAL）要求持证方为中国主体，但未施加与多米尼加共和国INDOTEL型式认可体系相同的授权代表模式。中国海关（GACC——中国海关总署）通过标准商业文件管理出口清关，不存在与多米尼加RNC/DGII授权进口商注册要求直接对应的中国机制。
summary.zht: 在中國，外國電子產品出口商無需以同等監管意義設置當地中國進口商——中國國內經銷商和進口商通過標準商業安排運營。電信終端設備的MIIT進網許可證（NAL）要求持證方為中國主體，但未施加與多明尼加共和國INDOTEL型式認可體系相同的授權代表模式。中國海關（GACC——中國海關總署）通過標準商業文件管理出口清關，不存在與多明尼加RNC/DGII授權進口商註冊要求直接對應的中國機制。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) — Chinese export customs authority; administers standard export clearance documentation
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — requires Chinese domestic licence holder for telecom terminal equipment sold in China; no direct equivalent to Dominican authorized importer requirement

gap.en: Chinese exporters have no direct equivalent to the Dominican RNC/DGII authorized importer system and must engage a locally registered Dominican company with a valid RNC number to serve as the named importer and INDOTEL homologación applicant. This entity takes on legal responsibility for regulatory compliance in the Dominican Republic. INDOTEL homologación applications must name the authorized Dominican importer; the certificate is typically issued in the importer's or manufacturer's name. Dominican customs (DGA) requires the INDOTEL homologación certificate for clearance of radio and telecom terminal equipment; shipments lacking the certificate risk detention and return. Spanish-language product labels must include the authorized importer's name and address, the INDOTEL homologación number, and applicable electrical ratings. CAFTA-DR membership does not create preferential treatment for Chinese goods specifically — Chinese exports are subject to standard MFN tariff rates through Santo Domingo or Port of Haina.
gap.zh: 中国出口商不存在与多米尼加RNC/DGII授权进口商体系直接对应的机制，须委托持有效RNC编号的本地注册多米尼加公司，作为具名进口商和INDOTEL型式认可申请人。该主体对在多米尼加共和国的监管合规承担法律责任。INDOTEL型式认可申请须注明授权多米尼加进口商；证书通常以进口商或制造商名义颁发。多米尼加海关（DGA）要求提供INDOTEL型式认可证书作为无线电及电信终端设备清关条件；缺少证书的货物面临扣押和退运风险。西班牙语产品标签须包含授权进口商姓名地址、INDOTEL型式认可编号及适用电气参数。CAFTA-DR成员资格不专门为中国商品创设优惠待遇——中国出口产品通过圣多明各港或海纳港须适用标准最惠国关税税率。
gap.zht: 中國出口商不存在與多明尼加RNC/DGII授權進口商體系直接對應的機制，須委託持有效RNC編號的本地註冊多明尼加公司，作為具名進口商和INDOTEL型式認可申請人。該主體對在多明尼加共和國的監管合規承擔法律責任。INDOTEL型式認可申請須注明授權多明尼加進口商；證書通常以進口商或製造商名義頒發。多明尼加海關（DGA）要求提供INDOTEL型式認可證書作為無線電及電信終端裝置清關條件；缺少證書的貨物面臨扣押和退運風險。西班牙語產品標籤須包含授權進口商姓名地址、INDOTEL型式認可編號及適用電氣參數。CAFTA-DR成員資格不專門為中國商品創設優惠待遇——中國出口產品通過聖多明各港或海納港須適用標準最惠國關稅稅率。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — authorized Dominican importer with valid RNC/DGII registration required as named party in INDOTEL homologación application; INDOTEL certificate required for DGA customs clearance; Spanish labelling with importer details required
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent authorized-importer registration requirement for Chinese domestic market; MIIT NAL requires domestic Chinese licence holder for telecom terminal equipment

source.publisher: DGII — Dirección General de Impuestos Internos (Dominican Republic)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An authorized Dominican importer with valid RNC registration through DGII is required as the named applicant in INDOTEL homologación filings and as the responsible party for regulatory compliance. INDOTEL homologación certificate must be presented to DGA customs for clearance of radio and telecom terminal equipment. Spanish-language labels must include the importer's details, INDOTEL number, and electrical ratings. CAFTA-DR does not create preferential tariff treatment for Chinese goods. Verify current INDOTEL application requirements, DGA customs documentation, and RNC registration procedures with a qualified Dominican regulatory and customs professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有DGII有效RNC注册的授权多米尼加进口商须作为INDOTEL型式认可申请的具名申请人及监管合规责任方。无线电及电信终端设备向DGA海关清关时须提供INDOTEL型式认可证书。西班牙语标签须包含进口商信息、INDOTEL编号及电气参数。CAFTA-DR不为中国商品创设优惠关税待遇。进入市场前请向合格的多米尼加监管和海关专业人士核验现行INDOTEL申请要求、DGA海关文件及RNC注册程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有DGII有效RNC註冊的授權多明尼加進口商須作為INDOTEL型式認可申請的具名申請人及監管合規責任方。無線電及電信終端裝置向DGA海關清關時須提供INDOTEL型式認可證書。西班牙語標籤須包含進口商資訊、INDOTEL編號及電氣參數。CAFTA-DR不為中國商品創設優惠關稅待遇。進入市場前請向合格的多明尼加監管和海關專業人士核驗現行INDOTEL申請要求、DGA海關文件及RNC註冊程序。
